testing.mock_patterns: Uses httptest.NewRecorder() for HTTP handler testing

ci.notes: No CI/CD configuration found. No .github/workflows, .tekton, Jenkinsfile, or other CI systems detected.

build.notes: This is a simple HTTP API server. The 'make run' target runs it directly with 'go run ./cmd/root -env=development'. No compiled artifacts are required for development. The Makefile 'audit' target runs: go mod tidy, go mod verify, go fmt, go vet, and go test.

conventions.import_style: Standard Go imports with internal packages using full module path: github.com/opendatahub-io/odh-dashboard-poc/dashboard-model-registry/internal/*
conventions.notes: Standard Go project layout with cmd/ for entrypoints and internal/ for application code. Package structure: application (handlers), data (models), integrations (k8s/http clients), utils (helpers), validation.
